FROM diagnostics 
GROUP BY localisation 
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT patient_id) > 40

SELECT s.nom AS service, SUM(c.salaire_brut_mensuel) AS masse_salariale_mensuelle
FROM services s
JOIN employes e ON s.service_id = e.service_id
JOIN contrats c ON e.employe_id = c.employe_id
WHERE c.date_fin IS NULL
GROUP BY s.service_id

SELECT d.localisation, COUNT(p.patient_id) AS nombre_decedes
FROM diagnostics d
JOIN patients p ON d.patient_id = p.patient_id
WHERE p.statut_vital = 'Décédé'
GROUP BY d.localisation

SELECT AVG(julianday(date_sortie) - julianday(date_entree)) AS duree_moyenne_jours
FROM sejours
WHERE type_sejour = 'Hospitalisation'

SELECT SUM(montant_total_eur) AS montant_total_facture, SUM(reste_a_charge_eur) AS reste_a_charge_total 
FROM factures 
WHERE statut = 'Impayée'

SELECT s.nom AS service, COUNT(e.employe_id) AS nb_employes_medicaux
FROM services s
JOIN employes e ON s.service_id = e.service_id AND e.categorie = 'Medical'
GROUP BY s.service_id

SELECT medecin_referent_id AS employe_id, COUNT(patient_id) AS nb_patients
FROM patients
GROUP BY medecin_referent_id
ORDER BY nb_patients DESC
LIMIT 5

SELECT 
    strftime('%Y-%m', date_emission) AS trimestre,
    SUM(montant_total_eur) AS chiffre_d_affaires
FROM 
    factures
WHERE 
    strftime('%Y', date_emission) = '2026'
GROUP BY 
    trimestre
ORDER BY 
    trimestre
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT patient_id) FROM chirurgies WHERE patient_id IN ( SELECT patient_id FROM seances_radio )
SELECT nom FROM medicaments WHERE medicament_id NOT IN (SELECT medicament_id FROM cures_chimio)

SELECT type_sejour, AVG(julianday(date_sortie) - julianday(date_entree)) AS duree_moyenne_jours
FROM sejours
GROUP BY type_sejour

SELECT s.service_id, s.nom, SUM(c.salaire_brut_mensuel * 12) AS masse_salariale
FROM services s
JOIN employes e ON s.service_id = e.service_id
JOIN contrats c ON e.employe_id = c.employe_id AND date_debut <= 'now' AND (date_fin IS NULL OR date_fin >= 'now')
GROUP BY s.service_id, s.nom
ORDER BY mass

SELECT d.stade_global, COUNT(p.patient_id) AS nombre_de_patients
FROM diagnostics d
JOIN patients p ON d.patient_id = p.patient_id
WHERE p.statut_vital = 'Décédé'
GROUP BY d.stade_global
SELECT AVG(nb_cures) FROM ( SELECT COUNT(*) AS nb_cures, patient_id FROM cures_chimio GROUP BY patient_id )

SELECT statut, AVG(reste_a_charge_eur) AS reste_moyen
FROM factures
GROUP BY statut

SELECT e.sexe, COUNT(a.absence_id) AS nombre_absences
FROM absences a
JOIN employes e ON a.employe_id = e.employe_id
GROUP BY e.sexe

SELECT e.categorie, COUNT(a.absence_id) AS nombre_absences
FROM absences a
JOIN employes e ON a.employe_id = e.employe_id
GROUP BY e.categorie

SELECT e.sexe, SUM(a.nb_jours) AS total_nb_jours
FROM absences a
JOIN employes e ON a.employe_id = e.employe_id
GROUP BY e.sexe
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM absences WHERE employe_id IN (SELECT employe_id FROM employes WHERE sexe = 'F')
SELECT COUNT(employe_id) FROM employes WHERE employe_id NOT IN ( SELECT employe_id FROM absences )

SELECT e.sexe, COUNT(b.biopsie_id) AS nombre_biopsies
FROM employes e
JOIN biopsies b ON e.employe_id = b.pathologiste_id
GROUP BY e.sexe

SELECT e.categorie, COUNT(b.biopsie_id) AS nombre_biopsies
FROM employes e
JOIN biopsies b ON e.employe_id = b.pathologiste_id
GROUP BY e.categorie

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM biopsies AS T1 
JOIN employes AS T2 ON T1.pathologiste_id = T2.employe_id 
WHERE T2.sexe = 'F'
SELECT COUNT(employe_id) FROM employes WHERE employe_id NOT IN ( SELECT pathologiste_id FROM biopsies )

SELECT p.sexe, COUNT(b.biopsie_id) AS nombre_biopsies
FROM patients p
JOIN biopsies b ON p.patient_id = b.patient_id
GROUP BY p.sexe

SELECT p.groupe_sanguin, COUNT(b.biopsie_id) AS nombre_biopsies
FROM patients p
JOIN biopsies b ON p.patient_id = b.patient_id
GROUP BY p.groupe_sanguin

SELECT p.statut_vital, COUNT(b.biopsie_id) AS nombre_biopsies
FROM patients p
JOIN biopsies b ON p.patient_id = b.patient_id
GROUP BY p.statut_vital
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM biopsies WHERE patient_id IN (SELECT patient_id FROM patients WHERE sexe = 'F')
SELECT COUNT(patient_id) FROM patients WHERE patient_id NOT IN ( SELECT patient_id FROM biopsies )

SELECT e.sexe, COUNT(c.chirurgie_id) AS nombre_chirurgies
FROM employes e
JOIN chirurgies c ON e.employe_id = c.chirurgien_id
GROUP BY e.sexe

SELECT e.categorie, COUNT(c.chirurgie_id) AS nombre_chirurgies
FROM employes e
JOIN chirurgies c ON e.employe_id = c.chirurgien_id
GROUP BY e.categorie

SELECT e.sexe, SUM(c.duree_minutes) AS total_duree_minutes
FROM employes e
JOIN chirurgies c ON e.employe_id = c.chirurgien_id
GROUP BY e.sexe
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM chirurgies WHERE chirurgien_id IN (SELECT employe_id FROM employes WHERE sexe = 'F')
SELECT COUNT(employe_id) FROM employes WHERE employe_id NOT IN ( SELECT DISTINCT chirurgien_id FROM chirurgies )

SELECT t.type, COUNT(c.chirurgie_id) AS nombre_chirurgies
FROM traitements t
JOIN chirurgies c ON t.traitement_id = c.traitement_id
GROUP BY t.type

SELECT t.protocole, COUNT(c.chirurgie_id) AS nombre_chirurgies
FROM traitements t
JOIN chirurgies c ON t.traitement_id = c.traitement_id
GROUP BY t.protocole

SELECT intention, COUNT(*) AS nombre_chirurgies
FROM traitements
JOIN chirurgies ON traitements.traitement_id = chirurgies.traitement_id
GROUP BY intention
SELECT type, SUM(duree_minutes) AS total_duree_minutes FROM traitements GROUP BY type
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM chirurgies WHERE traitement_id IN (SELECT traitement_id FROM traitements WHERE type = 'Chimiothérapie')
SELECT COUNT(traitement_id) FROM traitements WHERE traitement_id NOT IN ( SELECT traitement_id FROM chirurgies )

SELECT p.sexe, COUNT(c.chirurgie_id) AS nombre_chirurgies
FROM patients p
JOIN sejours s ON p.patient_id = s.patient_id
JOIN chirurgies c ON s.patient_id = c.patient_id
GROUP BY p.sexe

SELECT p.groupe_sanguin, COUNT(c.chirurgie_id) AS nombre_chirurgies
FROM patients p
JOIN sejours s ON p.patient_id = s.patient_id
JOIN chirurgies c ON p.patient_id = c.patient_id
GROUP BY p.groupe_sanguin

SELECT p.statut_vital, COUNT(c.chirurgie_id) AS nombre_chirurgies
FROM patients p
JOIN sejours s ON p.patient_id = s.patient_id
JOIN chirurgies c ON p.patient_id = c.patient_id
GROUP BY p.statut_vital

SELECT SUM(duree_minutes), p.sexe 
FROM patients p 
JOIN traitements t ON p.patient_id = t.patient_id 
GROUP BY p.sexe
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM patients AS P JOIN chirurgies AS C ON P.patient_id = C.patient_id WHERE P.sexe = 'F'
SELECT COUNT(patient_id) FROM patients WHERE patient_id NOT IN ( SELECT patient_id FROM chirurgies )

SELECT s.nom AS service_nom, COUNT(c.commande_id) AS nombre_commandes
FROM commandes c
JOIN services s ON c.service_id = s.service_id
GROUP BY s.nom

SELECT s.code, COUNT(c.commande_id) AS nombre_commandes
FROM commandes c
JOIN services s ON c.service_id = s.service_id
GROUP BY s.code

SELECT s.nom AS localisation, COUNT(c.commande_id) AS nombre_commandes
FROM commandes c
JOIN services s ON c.service_id = s.service_id
GROUP BY s.nom

SELECT s.nom, SUM(c.montant_total_eur) AS total_montant
FROM commandes c
JOIN services s ON c.service_id = s.service_id
GROUP BY s.nom
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM commandes AS T1 INNER JOIN services AS T2 ON T1.service_id = T2.service_id WHERE T2.nom = 'Administration & Finance'
SELECT COUNT(service_id) FROM services WHERE service_id NOT IN ( SELECT service_id FROM commandes )

SELECT f.nom, COUNT(c.commande_id) AS nombre_commandes
FROM fournisseurs f
JOIN commandes c ON f.fournisseur_id = c.fournisseur_id
GROUP BY f.nom

SELECT f.categorie, COUNT(c.commande_id) AS nombre_commandes
FROM commandes c
JOIN fournisseurs f ON c.fournisseur_id = f.fournisseur_id
GROUP BY f.categorie

SELECT f.ville, COUNT(c.commande_id) AS nombre_commandes
FROM fournisseurs f
JOIN commandes c ON f.fournisseur_id = c.fournisseur_id
GROUP BY f.ville

SELECT f.nom, SUM(c.montant_total_eur) AS total_montant
FROM commandes c
JOIN fournisseurs f ON c.fournisseur_id = f.fournisseur_id
GROUP BY f.nom
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM commandes WHERE fournisseur_id IN (SELECT fournisseur_id FROM fournisseurs WHERE nom = 'BioReactifs Plus')
SELECT COUNT(fournisseur_id) FROM fournisseurs WHERE fournisseur_id NOT IN (SELECT fournisseur_id FROM commandes)

SELECT s.nom AS service, COUNT(c.consultation_id) AS nombre_consultations
FROM consultations c
JOIN services s ON c.service_id = s.service_id
GROUP BY s.nom

SELECT s.code, COUNT(c.consultation_id) AS nombre_consultations
FROM consultations c
JOIN services s ON c.service_id = s.service_id
GROUP BY s.code

SELECT s.nom AS service, COUNT(c.consultation_id) AS nombre_consultations
FROM consultations c
JOIN patients p ON c.patient_id = p.patient_id
JOIN diagnostics d ON p.patient_id = d.patient_id
JOIN services s ON c.service_id = s.service_id
GROUP BY s.nom
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM consultations AS T1 INNER JOIN services AS T2 ON T1.service_id = T2.service_id WHERE T2.nom = 'Administration & Finance'
SELECT COUNT(service_id) FROM services WHERE service_id NOT IN (SELECT service_id FROM consultations)

SELECT e.sexe, COUNT(c.consultation_id) AS nombre_consultations
FROM employes e
JOIN consultations c ON e.employe_id = c.medecin_id
GROUP BY e.sexe

SELECT e.categorie, COUNT(c.consultation_id) AS nombre_consultations
FROM employes e
JOIN consultations c ON e.employe_id = c.medecin_id
GROUP BY e.categorie
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM consultations WHERE medecin_id IN (SELECT employe_id FROM employes WHERE sexe = 'F')
SELECT COUNT(employe_id) FROM employes WHERE employe_id NOT IN ( SELECT medecin_id FROM consultations )

SELECT p.sexe, COUNT(c.consultation_id) AS nombre_consultations
FROM patients p
JOIN consultations c ON p.patient_id = c.patient_id
GROUP BY p.sexe

SELECT p.groupe_sanguin, COUNT(c.consultation_id) AS nombre_consultations
FROM patients p
JOIN consultations c ON p.patient_id = c.patient_id
GROUP BY p.groupe_sanguin

SELECT p.statut_vital, COUNT(c.consultation_id) AS nombre_consultations
FROM patients p
JOIN consultations c ON p.patient_id = c.patient_id
GROUP BY p.statut_vital
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM consultations WHERE patient_id IN (SELECT patient_id FROM patients WHERE sexe = 'F')
SELECT COUNT(patient_id) FROM patients WHERE patient_id NOT IN (SELECT patient_id FROM consultations)

SELECT e.sexe, COUNT(c.employe_id) AS nombre_contrats
FROM employes e
JOIN contrats c ON e.employe_id = c.employe_id
GROUP BY e.sexe

SELECT e.categorie, COUNT(c.employe_id) AS nombre_contrats
FROM employes e

WHERE medicament_id NOT IN (SELECT medicament_id FROM stocks)

SELECT e.sexe, COUNT(t.traitement_id) AS nombre_de_traitements
FROM employes e
JOIN traitements t ON e.employe_id = t.medecin_id
GROUP BY e.sexe

SELECT e.categorie, COUNT(t.traitement_id) AS nombre_de_traitements
FROM employes e
JOIN traitements t ON e.employe_id = t.medecin_id
GROUP BY e.categorie

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.traitement_id) 
FROM traitements AS T1 
JOIN employes AS T2 ON T1.medecin_id = T2.employe_id 
WHERE T2.sexe = 'F'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM employes WHERE employe_id NOT IN (SELECT medecin_id FROM traitements)

SELECT d.localisation, COUNT(t.traitement_id) AS nombre_de_traitements
FROM diagnostics d
JOIN traitements t ON d.diagnostic_id = t.diagnostic_id
GROUP BY d.localisation

SELECT d.code_cim10, COUNT(t.traitement_id) AS nombre_de_traitements
FROM diagnostics d
JOIN traitements t ON d.diagnostic_id = t.diagnostic_id
GROUP BY d.code_cim10

SELECT d.libelle, COUNT(t.traitement_id) AS nombre_de_traitements
FROM diagnostics d
JOIN traitements t ON d.diagnostic_id = t.diagnostic_id
GROUP BY d.libelle

SELECT COUNT(traitement_id) 
FROM traitements 
JOIN diagnostics ON traitements.diagnostic_id = diagnostics.diagnostic_id 
WHERE diagnostics.localisation = 'Cerveau'

SELECT COUNT(diagnostic_id) 
FROM diagnostics 
WHERE diagnostic_id NOT IN (SELECT diagnostic_id FROM traitements)

SELECT p.sexe, COUNT(t.traitement_id) AS nombre_de_traitements
FROM patients p
JOIN traitements t ON p.patient_id = t.patient_id
GROUP BY p.sexe

SELECT p.groupe_sanguin, COUNT(t.traitement_id) AS nombre_de_traitements
FROM patients p
JOIN traitements t ON p.patient_id = t.patient_id
GROUP BY p.groupe_sanguin

SELECT p.statut_vital, COUNT(t.traitement_id) AS nombre_de_traitements
FROM patients p
JOIN traitements t ON p.patient_id = t.patient_id
GROUP BY p.statut_vital

SELECT COUNT(traitement_id) 
FROM traitements 
JOIN patients ON traitements.patient_id = patients.patient_id 
WHERE patients.sexe = 'F'
SELECT COUNT(patient_id) FROM patients WHERE patient_id NOT IN (SELECT patient_id FROM traitements)

SELECT type 
FROM absences 
GROUP BY type 
HAVING COUNT(*) >= 84
SELECT DISTINCT code FROM actes
SELECT DISTINCT libelle FROM actes WHERE libelle IN (SELECT libelle FROM actes GROUP BY libelle HAVING COUNT(*) > 0)

SELECT type_histologique 
FROM biopsies 
GROUP BY type_histologique 
HAVING COUNT(*) >= 121

SELECT bloc 
FROM chirurgies 
GROUP BY bloc 
HAVING COUNT(*) >= 42

SELECT complications 
FROM chirurgies 
GROUP BY complications 
HAVING COUNT(*) >= 59

SELECT statut 
FROM commandes 
GROUP BY statut 
HAVING COUNT(commande_id) >= 27

SELECT motif 
FROM consultations 
GROUP BY motif 
HAVING COUNT(*) >= 640

SELECT DISTINCT compte_rendu 
FROM consultations 
GROUP BY compte_rendu 
HAVING COUNT(*) >= 818

SELECT type_contrat 
FROM contrats 
GROUP BY type_contrat 
HAVING COUNT(*) >= 25

SELECT effets_indesirables 
FROM cures_chimio 
GROUP BY effets_indesirables 
HAVING COUNT(*) >= 457

SELECT stade_global 
FROM diagnostics 
GROUP BY stade_global 
HAVING COUNT(diagnostic_id) >= 171

SELECT grade_histologique 
FROM diagnostics 
GROUP BY grade_histologique 
HAVING COUNT(*) >= 196

SELECT categorie 
FROM employes 
GROUP BY categorie 
HAVING COUNT(*) >= 61

SELECT DISTINCT nom 
FROM equipements

SELECT categorie 
FROM equipements 
GROUP BY categorie 
HAVING COUNT(*) >= 2

SELECT s.nom AS service, SUM(c.salaire_brut_mensuel) AS masse_salariale_mensuelle 
FROM services s 
JOIN employes e ON s.service_id = e.service_id 
JOIN contrats c ON e.employe_id = c.employe_id 
WHERE c.date_fin IS NULL 
GROUP BY s.service_id

SELECT s.service_id, s.nom, SUM(c.salaire_brut_mensuel) as masse_salariale 
FROM services s 
JOIN employes e ON s.service_id = e.service_id 
JOIN contrats c ON e.employe_id = c.employe_id 
WHERE c.date_fin IS NULL 
GROUP BY s.service_id, s.nom 
ORDER BY masse_salariale DESC 
LIMIT 3

SELECT p.sexe, SUM(c.duree_minutes) AS somme_duree FROM chirurgies c JOIN patients p ON p.patient_id = c.patient_id GROUP BY p.sexe ORDER BY somme_duree
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT p.patient_id) AS nb_chirurgies FROM chirurgies c JOIN patients p ON p.patient_id = c.patient_id WHERE p.sexe = 'F'
SELECT COUNT(patient_id) FROM patients WHERE patient_id NOT IN ( SELECT patient_id FROM chirurgies )
SELECT s.nom, COUNT(c.commande_id) AS nb_commandes FROM commandes c JOIN services s ON s.service_id = c.service_id GROUP BY s.service_id ORDER BY nb_commandes DESC
SELECT s.code, COUNT(c.commande_id) AS nb_commandes FROM services s JOIN commandes c ON c.service_id = s.service_id GROUP BY s.code ORDER BY nb_commandes DESC
SELECT se.localisation, COUNT(DISTINCT c.commande_id) AS nb_commandes FROM services se JOIN commandes c ON c.service_id = se.service_id GROUP BY se.localisation ORDER BY nb_commandes DESC
SELECT s.nom, SUM(c.montant_total_eur) AS total_montant_eur FROM commandes c JOIN services s ON s.service_id = c.service_id GROUP BY s.nom ORDER BY total_montant_eur DESC
SELECT COUNT(c.commande_id) FROM services s JOIN commandes c ON c.service_id = s.service_id WHERE s.nom = 'Administration & Finance'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM services WHERE service_id NOT IN ( SELECT DISTINCT service_id FROM commandes )

SELECT f.ville, COUNT(c.commande_id) AS nombre_commandes FROM fournisseurs f JOIN commandes c ON f.fournisseur_id = c.fournisseur_id GROUP BY f.ville ORDER BY nombre_commandes DESC
SELECT f.nom, SUM(c.montant_total_eur) AS total_montant FROM commandes c JOIN fournisseurs f ON f.fournisseur_id = c.fournisseur_id GROUP BY f.nom ORDER BY total_montant DESC

SELECT s.nom, COUNT(DISTINCT c.consultation_id) AS nb_consultations FROM consultations c JOIN services s ON s.service_id = c.service_id GROUP BY s.nom ORDER BY nb_consultations DESC
SELECT s.code, COUNT(DISTINCT c.consultation_id) AS nb_consultations FROM consultations c JOIN services s ON s.service_id = c.service_id GROUP BY s.code ORDER BY nb_consultations DESC
SELECT s.localisation, COUNT(DISTINCT c.consultation_id) AS nb_consultations FROM consultations c JOIN services s ON s.service_id = c.service_id GROUP BY s.localisation ORDER BY nb_consultations DESC

SELECT p.statut_vital, COUNT(DISTINCT c.consultation_id) AS nb_consultations FROM patients p JOIN consultations c ON c.patient_id = p.patient_id GROUP BY p.statut_vital ORDER BY nb_consultations DESC

SELECT e.categorie, COUNT(c.contrat_id) AS nb_contrats FROM employes e JOIN contrats c ON c.employe_id = e.employe_id WHERE c.date_fin IS NULL GROUP BY e.categorie ORDER BY nb_contrats DESC
SELECT e.sexe, SUM(c.temps_travail) AS somme_temps_travail FROM contrats c JOIN employes e ON e.employe_id = c.employe_id GROUP BY e.sexe ORDER BY somme_temps_travail DESC

SELECT m.dci, COUNT(DISTINCT c.cure_id) AS nb_cures FROM cures_chimio c JOIN medicaments m ON m.medicament_id = c.medicament_id GROUP BY m.dci ORDER BY nb_cures DESC
SELECT m.classe, COUNT(DISTINCT cc.cure_id) AS nb_cures FROM medicaments m JOIN cures_chimio cc ON cc.medicament_id = m.medicament_id GROUP BY m.classe ORDER BY nb_cures DESC

SELECT p.groupe_sanguin, COUNT(DISTINCT cc.cure_id) AS nb_cures FROM patients p JOIN cures_chimio cc ON cc.patient_id = p.patient_id GROUP BY p.groupe_sanguin ORDER BY nb_cures DESC
SELECT p.statut_vital, COUNT(DISTINCT c.cure_id) AS nb_cures FROM patients p JOIN cures_chimio c ON p.patient_id = c.patient_id GROUP BY p.statut_vital ORDER BY nb_cures DESC

SELECT T1.code, COUNT(*) AS n FROM services AS T1 INNER JOIN sejours AS T2 ON T1.service_id = T2.service_id GROUP BY T1.code
SELECT s.localisation, COUNT(*) AS nb_sejours FROM sejours se JOIN services s ON se.service_id = s.service_id GROUP BY s.localisation
SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM sejours s JOIN services se ON se.service_id = s.service_id WHERE se.nom = 'Administration & Finance'
SELECT COUNT(service_id) AS n FROM services WHERE service_id NOT IN ( SELECT DISTINCT service_id FROM sejours )
SELECT DISTINCT p.sexe, COUNT(DISTINCT s.sejour_id) AS nb_sejours FROM patients p JOIN sejours s ON p.patient_id = s.patient_id GROUP BY p.sexe
SELECT p.groupe_sanguin, COUNT(DISTINCT s.patient_id) AS n FROM patients p JOIN sejours s ON p.patient_id = s.patient_id GROUP BY p.groupe_sanguin ORDER BY n DESC
SELECT p.statut_vital, COUNT(DISTINCT s.sejour_id) AS n FROM sejours s JOIN patients p ON p.patient_id = s.patient_id GROUP BY p.statut_vital
SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM sejours s JOIN patients p ON p.patient_id = s.patient_id WHERE p.sexe = 'F'
SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM patients p WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM sejours s WHERE s.patient_id = p.patient_id )
SELECT m.nom, COUNT(s.stock_id) AS n FROM medicaments m JOIN stocks s ON m.medicament_id = s.medicament_id GROUP BY m.nom ORDER BY n DESC
SELECT m.dci, COUNT(*) AS n FROM medicaments m JOIN stocks s ON m.medicament_id = s.medicament_id GROUP BY m.dci
SELECT m.classe, COUNT(*) AS n FROM stocks s JOIN medicaments m ON m.medicament_id = s.medicament_id GROUP BY m.classe
SELECT m.nom, SUM(s.quantite) as total FROM stocks s JOIN medicaments m ON m.medicament_id = s.medicament_id GROUP BY m.nom
SELECT SUM(quantite) AS total_stocks FROM stocks WHERE medicament_id IN ( SELECT medicament_id FROM medicaments WHERE nom = '5-Fluorouracile' )
SELECT count(*) FROM medicaments WHERE medicament_id NOT IN ( SELECT medicament_id FROM stocks )
SELECT e.sexe, COUNT(t.traitement_id) AS n FROM traitements t JOIN employes e ON e.employe_id = t.medecin_id GROUP BY e.sexe
SELECT T2.categorie, COUNT(T1.traitement_id) AS n FROM traitements AS T1 JOIN employes AS T2 ON T1.medecin_id = T2.employe_id GROUP BY T2.categorie
SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM traitements t JOIN employes e ON e.employe_id = t.medecin_id WHERE e.sexe = 'F'
SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM employes WHERE employe_id NOT IN ( SELECT medecin_id FROM traitements )
SELECT d.localisation, COUNT(DISTINCT t.patient_id) AS n FROM diagnostics d JOIN traitements t ON d.diagnostic_id = t.diagnostic_id GROUP BY d.localisation ORDER BY n DESC
SELECT d.code_cim10, COUNT(*) AS n FROM diagnostics d JOIN traitements t ON d.diagnostic_id = t.diagnostic_id GROUP BY d.code_cim10 ORDER BY n DESC LIMIT 5
SELECT d.libelle, COUNT(DISTINCT t.traitement_id) AS n FROM diagnostics d JOIN traitements t ON d.diagnostic_id = t.diagnostic_id GROUP BY d.libelle ORDER BY n DESC LIMIT 10
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM traitements WHERE diagnostic_id IN ( SELECT diagnostic_id FROM diagnostics WHERE localisation = 'Cerveau' )
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM diagnostics WHERE diagnostic_id NOT IN ( SELECT diagnostic_id FROM traitements )
SELECT p.sexe, COUNT(DISTINCT t.traitement_id) AS n FROM patients p JOIN traitements t ON p.patient_id = t.patient_id GROUP BY p.sexe
SELECT p.groupe_sanguin, COUNT(*) AS n FROM traitements t JOIN patients p ON p.patient_id = t.patient_id GROUP BY p.groupe_sanguin
SELECT p.statut_vital, COUNT(t.traitement_id) AS n FROM patients p JOIN traitements t ON p.patient_id = t.patient_id GROUP BY p.statut_vital
SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM traitements t JOIN patients p ON p.patient_id = t.patient_id WHERE p.sexe = 'F'
SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM patients WHERE patient_id NOT IN ( SELECT DISTINCT patient_id FROM traitements )
SELECT type FROM absences GROUP BY type HAVING COUNT(*) >= 84
SELECT DISTINCT code FROM actes
SELECT DISTINCT libelle FROM actes GROUP BY libelle HAVING COUNT(*) > 0
SELECT type_histologique FROM biopsies GROUP BY type_histologique HAVING COUNT(*) >= 121
SELECT bloc FROM chirurgies GROUP BY bloc HAVING COUNT(*) >= 42
SELECT complications FROM chirurgies GROUP BY complications HAVING COUNT(*) >= 59
SELECT statut, COUNT(*) AS n FROM commandes GROUP BY statut HAVING n >= 27
SELECT DISTINCT motif FROM consultations GROUP BY motif HAVING COUNT(*) >= 640
SELECT compte_rendu FROM consultations GROUP BY compte_rendu HAVING COUNT(*) >= 818
SELECT type_contrat FROM contrats WHERE type_contrat IN ( SELECT type_contrat FROM contrats GROUP BY type_contrat HAVING COUNT(*) >= 25 )
SELECT effets_indesirables FROM cures_chimio GROUP BY effets_indesirables HAVING COUNT(*) >= 457
SELECT stade_global FROM diagnostics GROUP BY stade_global HAVING COUNT(*) >= 171
SELECT grade_histologique FROM diagnostics GROUP BY grade_histologique HAVING COUNT(*) >= 196
SELECT DISTINCT categorie FROM employes GROUP BY categorie HAVING COUNT(*) >= 61
SELECT nom FROM equipements GROUP BY nom HAVING COUNT(*) >= 1
SELECT categorie FROM equipements GROUP BY categorie HAVING COUNT(*) >= 2
SELECT DISTINCT code FROM essais_cliniques
SELECT DISTINCT titre FROM essais_cliniques WHERE titre IS NOT NULL AND titre != ''
